title: RouteOpt Bench
description: A benchmark suite for learning-based vehicle routing and scheduling, with standardized datasets, baselines, and reproducibility scripts.

title: NAS-Lite
description: A lightweight neural architecture search toolkit focused on cost-aware model selection for scientific and edge workloads.

title: SciFusion
description: A multimodal training framework for scientific machine learning with unified dataloading, alignment losses, and experiment tracking.

title: Academic Portfolio Template
description: A production-ready Astro template for researchers, including publications, projects, blog, and automated GitHub Pages deployment.
